name: Sauteed Trout W/Bacon & Chives "Lemonette
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Chives, Chopped into ½-inch Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat.
2. Lightly season and flour the trout. Saute half the trout until browned, about three minutes on each side, and set aside on a warm platter.
3. Add the remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil to the pan and saute the rest of the trout, removing it to the platter as it is done. Keep warm.
4. Add the bacon to the pan and saute until brown and beginning to crisp.
5. Turn off the heat and add the garlic, chives, and lemon juice to the pan.
6. Adjust the salt and pepper to taste.
7. To serve, place two fillets on each of four warm plates and spoon the dressing over the trout.
